title: Oramac
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Oramac''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It attempted to reinforce the [[System Patrol Squadron]] above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Farfeld II]], but was destroyed by a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
